description: Replace Commercial.DiscoveryPipeline's seed_candidates-only production path with an intent-named Ash action that executes Exa discovery for a DiscoveryProgram using its industries, regions, terms, criteria, and budget. Reuse LeadPreview behavior where appropriate without bypassing domain interfaces. Acceptance: a program run produces persisted candidate telemetry from Exa and no longer requires manually seeded candidates.
title: Replace seed-only discovery runs with Exa candidate generation
